TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_cinsali‚Äô, title = cinsali‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/cinsali‚Äô} }

S.FORM: cinsali' pitu hi cinsali' myan. uba mu ga kba' ci cminun takil. uya mu ga kba' ci cminun pala. yaba mu hiya ga musa mtiyow krryax. yaya mu ga mlahang sali'. kinan ro suyan mu likuy ro sswe mu kneril ga, mso'un myan musa mowas pn'wasan biru krryax, 'oyat ro knble'an ci inyanux na cinsali' myan.

cinsali' pitu hi cinsali' myan. uba mu ga kba' ci cminun takil. uya mu ga kba' ci cminun pala. yaba mu hiya ga musa mtiyow krryax. yaya mu ga mlahang sali'. kinan ro suyan mu likuy ro sswe mu kneril ga, mso'un myan musa mowas pn'wasan biru krryax, 'oyat ro knble'an ci inyanux na cinsali' myan.
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ins~…ēali Ē pitu ńßi ¶~ ®ins~…ēali Ē mjan. uő≤a mu …£a kő≤a Ē ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®minun takil. uja mu …£a kő≤a Ē ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®minun pala. jaő≤a mu ńßija …£a mus~…ēa mtijow krrjax. jaja mu …£a mlańßaŇč s~…ēali Ē. kinan ro s~…ēujan mu likuj ro s~…ēs~…ēwe mu kneril …£a, ms~…ēo Ēun mjan mus~…ēa mowas~…ē pn Ēwas~…ēan ő≤iru krrjax, Ēojat ro knő≤le Ēan ¶~ ®i injanux na ¶~ ®ins~…ēali Ē mjan.
